description: Add a reaction on a comment. Pull requests support only the like action (Git pull request comment likes API). Work items support reaction types: like, dislike, heart, hooray, smile, confused (WIT comments reactions preview).

resource.description: Whether the comment is on a pull request thread or a work item.

organization.description: Azure DevOps organization name when required by the configured API URL.

repository.description: Repository name or ID (required for pull_request).

thread_id.description: Comment thread id from threads list (required for pull_request).

comment_id.description: Comment id within the thread (PR) or work item comment id from comments list.

reaction.description: For pull_request use 'like'. For work_item use like, dislike, heart, hooray, smile, or confused.
